case_title: VION HOLDINGS LLC VS. MICHAEL LITTLE et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VION HOLDINGS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LITTLE, MICHAEL DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-02-2012
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-21-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT LITTLE, MICHAEL
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT BY MAIL ON 5/24/12, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF VION HOLDINGS LLC SERVED MAY-23-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LITTLE, MICHAEL

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-19-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR THE SUBMISSION OF CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENTS. THE AUG-21-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VION HOLDINGS LLC ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 HOURS
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT LITTLE, MICHAEL JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 1.0 DAYS
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR OCT-15-2012. SEP-19-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE OCT-25-2012.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR JAMES FREDERICK LYNCH.
ARBITRATOR DAVID MICHAEL BIGELEISEN APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION OCT-26-2012 THROUGH JAN-24-2013.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE .
ASSIGNMENT TO ARBITRATION OF OCT-26-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE.
